name: Paid Telegram Command Agent
description: Turns Telegram bot commands into paid, receipt-gated agent actions using the self-hosted Telegram launcher.
degenPitch: Telegram command becomes a paid machine.
whatItDoes: Verifies receipt before returning premium output.
Runs self-hosted with local BotFather token only.
feeBehavior: Each paid command shows visible fees and verifies receipt before unlock.
cursorPrompt: Build a Paid Telegram Command Agent using DNA x402. Use launchers/telegram, quote command output, verify receipt, unlock the result, and keep the BotFather token local.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Paid Telegram Command Agent using DNA x402. Use launchers/telegram, quote command output, verify receipt, unlock the result, and keep the BotFather token local.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt ID is returned with response.
Paid retry avoids duplicate command charge.
